overall.description: A cinematic nighttime flythrough of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera glides smoothly along an elevated neon-lit highway, passing towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements and vibrant signage. The atmosphere is dense with atmospheric haze and glowing artificial light sources dominating the dark urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through neon-lit corporate district

agents.ego_description: smoothly gliding forward along the elevated highway, maintaining steady altitude

entered.detail: large red neon sign with white lettering on the right building facade
multi-lane elevated road with glowing yellow lane markers curving through the city
tall cylindrical skyscraper with horizontal red neon rings and illuminated windows
dark silhouetted high-rise buildings with scattered lit windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sweeping view of a cyberpunk cityscape at night. The camera moves steadily along an elevated highway, with a prominent red neon SOI sign dominating the right foreground. In the distance, a distinctive cylindrical tower with red neon rings rises above the skyline, while the highway stretches forward with glowing lane markers.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor with large-scale advertising displays

events.description: soi_neon_sign exits the frame right as camera passes the building
large monochrome holographic billboard on right building becomes fully visible

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the curved highway, gradually turning left toward the central tower

entered.detail: tall glass building with illuminated windows and large advertising displays
large vertical monochrome advertisement showing a torso with hands on the right building

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves past the SOI sign, the right side of the frame reveals a massive glass office tower featuring a prominent holographic billboard. The central neon tower grows larger in the frame as the highway curves gently left. The urban density increases with towering structures on both sides of the elevated roadway.

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady forward motion toward the illuminated central tower

segments.scene_description: The final segment brings the camera closer to the central neon tower, which now dominates the center of the frame. The holographic billboard on the right fills more of the view as the camera passes alongside it. The highway continues forward with glowing markers leading toward the towering corporate structures ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera glide along an elevated highway that moves from a wide cityscape view toward the imposing core of a neon-lit corporate district. It begins with a sweeping perspective of the nighttime metropolis, passing a prominent red neon SOI sign while a distant cylindrical tower with red rings anchors the horizon. As the camera moves past the sign, the view expands to reveal a massive glass office tower featuring a glowing holographic billboard, while the highway curves gently left to increase the surrounding urban density. The scene then shifts as the camera draws closer to the central neon tower, which grows to dominate the frame. Finally, the holographic billboard fills the right side of the view as the camera surges forward along glowing lane markers toward the towering corporate structures ahead.
